 Andris Raugulis wrote:
 > Hello!
 >
 > I recently posted PR ports/117058 and you took resposibility of it. It
 > was devel/geany update to 0.11 version.
 >
 > What actions now would be correct from me if I want to submit update to=
 
 > version 0.12 (because my previous patch isn't commited)? - just post ne=
 w
 > PR or include in new PR message to ignore previous PR?
 >
 >
 >  =20
 Hey dear Andris,
 
 Well, you can send a patch of new version and use the same PR.
 Could you please, 'hack' the new patch and send mail to
 bug-follwup@FreeBSD.org with Subject you put 'ports/117058: [PATCH]
 devel/geany: update to 0.11'
 
 This situation are the correct.
 
 Thanks, best regards!
 
 --=20
 Marcelo Araujo            (__)
 araujo@FreeBSD.org     \\\'',)
 http://www.FreeBSD.org   \/  \ ^
 Power To Server.         .\. /_)
